phrases.intent_en: Ask where the carved wooden pulpit is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o púlpito de madeira entalhado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POOL-pee-too DIH muh-DAY-ruh ayng-tuh-LYAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Baroque churches typically position pulpits for optimal acoustics and visibility.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou a um guia.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW AH OONNG GEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sacristan or a guide.

responses.english: Ask the sacristan or a guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW AH OONNG GEEUH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou a um guia.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the carved wooden pulpit?
phrases.text_local: Em que parte da igreja está o púlpito?
phrases.cultural_note: Pulpits were traditionally positioned to maximize congregational visibility during sermons.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, situa-se junto ao altar principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, see-TOOUH-SIH ZHOONNG-too OW ahl-TAHR preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is located next to the main altar.

responses.english: Good morning, it is located next to the main altar.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, see-TOOUH-SIH ZHOONNG-too OW ahl-TAHR preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, situa-se junto ao altar principal.

phrases.text_local: Onde está o teto de madeira pintado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW TEH-too DIH muh-DAY-ruh peen-TAH-doo?

phrases.intent_en: Where is the carved wooden pulpit?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o púlpito de madeira esculpida?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POOL-pee-too DIH muh-DAY-ruh shkoow-PEE-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: O púlpito de madeira esculpida é uma peça de destaque na nave única da igreja.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está na nave principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH NAH-vih preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's in the main nave.

responses.english: Good morning, it's in the main nave.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH NAH-vih preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, está na nave principal.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o altar-mor em talha dourada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW ahl-TAHR-MAWR AYNG TAH-lyuh doow-RAH-duh?

likely_response.local: O altar-mor em talha dourada encontra-se no centro da nave, à frente. Pode pedir mais informações ao guia voluntário local.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW ahl-TAHR-MAWR AYNG TAH-lyuh doow-RAH-duh ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH NOO SAYNGT-roo DUH NAH-vih, AH FRAYNG-tih. PAW-dih pih-DEER MEYESH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: The gilded main altar is located in the center of the nave, ahead. You can ask the local volunteer guide for more information.

responses.english: The gilded main altar is located in the center of the nave, ahead. You can ask the local volunteer guide for more information.
responses.phonetic: AW ahl-TAHR-MAWR AYNG TAH-lyuh doow-RAH-duh ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH NOO SAYNGT-roo DUH NAH-vih, AH FRAYNG-tih. PAW-dih pih-DEER MEYESH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo loo-KAHL.
responses.local: O altar-mor em talha dourada encontra-se no centro da nave, à frente. Pode pedir mais informações ao guia voluntário local.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the painted wooden ceiling?
phrases.text_local: Como posso ver o tecto de madeira pintado?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo PAW-soo VEHR AW TEH-too DIH muh-DAY-ruh peen-TAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Wooden painted ceilings are a hallmark of Algarve's ecclesiastical heritage.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está no tecto da nave central.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NOO TEH-too DUH NAH-vih sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is on the central nave ceiling.

responses.english: Good morning, it is on the central nave ceiling.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NOO TEH-too DUH NAH-vih sayngt-RAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, está no tecto da nave central.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the gilded main altar?
phrases.text_local: Onde está localizado o altar-mor em talha dourada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-doo AW ahl-TAHR-MAWR AYNG TAH-lyuh doow-RAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: The main altar serves as the primary devotional focal point in Portuguese religious architecture.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica no fundo da capela-mor.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO FOONNG-doo DUH kuh-PEH-luh-MAWR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is located at the back of the main chapel.

responses.english: Good morning, it is located at the back of the main chapel.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO FOONNG-doo DUH kuh-PEH-luh-MAWR.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica no fundo da capela-mor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the sacristy with tiles is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde fica a sacristia com azulejos?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH suhk-reesh-TEEUH KOHM uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The sacristy is a quiet area; visitors may be asked to maintain silence.

likely_response.local: Ao fundo do corredor, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW FOONNG-doo DOO koo-rih-DOHR, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the corridor, on the right.

responses.english: At the end of the corridor, on the right.
responses.phonetic: OW FOONNG-doo DOO koo-rih-DOHR, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: Ao fundo do corredor, à direita.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sacristia com azulejos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH suhk-reesh-TEEUH KOHM uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Tile-covered sacristies serve both functional and devotional purposes in Portuguese churches.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a sacristia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH suhk-reesh-TEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the sacristy.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the sacristy.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH suhk-reesh-TEEUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a sacristia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the carved wooden pulpit is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o púlpito de madeira esculpida?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW POOL-pee-too DIH muh-DAY-ruh shkoow-PEE-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: O púlpito de madeira esculpida é uma peça de destaque na nave única da igreja.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está na nave principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH NAH-vih preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's in the main nave.

responses.english: Good morning, it's in the main nave.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH NAH-vih preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, está na nave principal.
